title: Cataclysm: Spellbooks
description: An addon for Iron's Spells and Spellbooks and L_Ender's Cataclysm
body:
# 📜Description
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d8ab12634504d8b62f49d6751a988be719fd379.png)
**Cataclysm: Spellbooks** is an addon for both [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) and [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm).

Currently this mod adds in a total of 65 new spells, with more planned for development. This mod also adds in two new spell schools: _**Abyssal**_ and _**Technomancy**_. The Abyssal School houses all of the Leviathan based spells, and Technomancy is inspired by The Harbinger.

<center>
  
_NOTE: THIS MOD IS STILL BEING DEVELOPED AND SPELLS WILL BE ADDED!_

</center>

If you would like to see which spells are planned, head over to the [Github Page](https://github.com/AceTheEldritchKing/Cataclysm_Spellbooks) to check!

---

<center>

[![Discord Button (StarOcean)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dede1998b3e837f4f2c1d274d06310989ed19e98.png)](https://discord.gg/c8zY8fDYXz)[![Discord Button (Ace)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63933d172549dce83eb495866814ae13a7af5884.png)](https://discord.gg/SCprzpvhK8)
